x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: PowerApps CLI - Utilities for PowerApps development

commands.name: schema-export
commands.description: Extract metadata schema from PowerApps/Dataverse environments

commands.name: constants-generate
commands.description: Generate C# constants from Dataverse metadata

commands.name: refdata-compare
commands.description: Compare reference data between source and target Dataverse environments

commands.name: process-manage
commands.description: Manage Dataverse process states (workflows, flows, business rules)

commands.name: refdata-migrate
commands.description: Migrate reference data from source to target Dataverse environment

commands.name: data-patch
commands.description: Apply targeted field-level updates to Dataverse records

commands.name: solution-layers
commands.description: Report unmanaged layers on a solution's components post-deployment
